raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image features bright orange flowers with multiple petals, which matches the visual characteristics of the flowers in the examples labeled as class 45. The other classes (44 and 77) feature purple and pink/white flowers, respectively.
</explanation>

<response>45</response>

<explanation>
The target image features purple flowers with a similar petal structure and central yellow stamens as seen in the examples labeled '44'. It does not match the orange flowers (45) or the pink/white lotus-style flowers (77).
</explanation>

<response>44</response>

raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image shows a large pink flower with broad, overlapping petals and large green leaves in the background. This visual pattern matches the examples for class 77, which feature large, multi-petaled flowers (pink or white) and large green leaves. In contrast, class 45 features orange/yellow flowers and class 44 features purple flowers.
</explanation>

<response>77</response>

message.content:
<explanation>
The target image shows a large pink flower with broad, overlapping petals and large green leaves in the background. This visual pattern matches the examples for class 77, which feature large, multi-petaled flowers (pink or white) and large green leaves. In contrast, class 45 features orange/yellow flowers and class 44 features purple flowers.
</explanation>

<response>77</response>
